title: In Parliament | My Site
headings: h2: In the House of Commons
text_excerpt: --> In Parliament | My Site top of page Home About Kim News In Parliament In Spen Valley Contact Office Standards Find Help More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. In Parliament In Westminster, I work hard to be a strong voice for Spen Valley, raising the issues that matter to our community at the heart of national decision-making. I always bring a down-to-earth, common-sense approach grounded in the real experiences of people back home, making sure that local concerns, from planning, to transport, and potholes - aren’t forgotten in Westminster, because I believe that national policy should work for local communities. In the House of Commons See my speeches here. Hansard Work in Parliament: Below you can see a snapshot of some of my latest work and activity in Parliament. APPGs (All Party Parliamentary Groups) Women and Work APPG SEND APPG Women in Sport APPG Football APPG Rugby League APPG APPG for Hospices Drop-ins and Events Big Iftar Keep Britain Tidy Jo Cox Civility Commission Safer Internet Day Roundtable World Book Day Endometriosis Awareness Women and Equalities Committee Community Cohesion Misogyny in Music Egg Donation and Freezing Black Homelessness Reproductive Health Conditions Social Mobility Speaking: Subscribe to Kim's monthly newsletter First name Last name Email * Join I want to subscribe to your mailing list.
